name: Italian Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice zucchini thinly. Place in saucepan, cover, and boil for 30 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. In a large frying pan, combine onion and margarine. Brown onion slightly.
3. Stir in parsley, salt, pepper, garlic powder, basil, and oregano. Cook on medium heat for 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
4. In a large bowl, mix eggs and cheese. Add zucchini mixture and parsley mixture. Stir well.
5. Unroll crescent rolls, line a 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish with dough.
6. Pour zucchini mixture into the pie plate. Bake for 10 minutes uncovered, then 10 more minutes covered with aluminum foil at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Turn off oven and leave the quiche in the oven for 2 to 3 minutes.
